summary: Loud, crystal‑clear audience recording that captures an epic 1990 show with overwhelming crowd energy.
review: Both reviewers gave five stars, praising the massive volume and clarity of this audience (AUD) tape—instrumentation and vocals cut through a very loud crowd while preserving ambience. The performance is described as “epic” and a “night to remember,” though no specific songs or band‑member moments are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are enthusiastic (5 stars) and highlight excellent sound quality and an epic performance; with limited detail on individual songs the rating leans toward a strong but not perfect score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very loud overall with clear instrument/vocal separation despite heavy crowd noise and reverb; crowd reaction is prominent but does not drown out the music.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not comment on specific set structure, only expressing overall enthusiasm for the concert’s energy and atmosphere.
